title: toxicoscordion gramineum
intro: Toxicoscordion gramineum, also known as death camas, is a perennial plant species native to western North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, although its use is not recommended due to its toxic compounds. In herbal preparations, death camas is often used in small quantities in topical creams and salves, but its use should be approached with caution and under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional.
